title: Heterogeneous multi-bot team run end-to-end proof
acceptance: Fixture task with medium sizing produces a roster where at least three roles run on at least two different providers (e.g. claude-code implementer, gemini reviewer, openai validator) in one run.
Each spawned bot yields its own `atm.teamProviderRunArtifact.v1` with distinct sessionId (task:role:provider:model), permission decision, and observability events.
A same-run broker conflict scenario shows one bot blocked with `broker-conflict-blocked` while the others proceed, proving per-bot (not per-run) governance.
`team-vendor-runtime.md` gains a "heterogeneous team run" walkthrough with the exact commands, plus a manual live-run appendix (env secret refs only, no raw secrets).
The sizing manual override path (`--team-size large`) is exercised once in the fixture to prove the human-designation lane.
outOfScope: Live paid API calls in CI (use injected executors; live run is a manual dry-run appendix)
nonGoals: Do not turn the proof fixture into a second scheduler or bypass broker gates
rollbackNotes: Revert fixture, validator case, and doc section together.

claim.reason: Historical delivery 072cadf4 is a shared Team Agents closeback commit; TASK-TEAM-0052 scoped deliverables are matched and unrelated files belong to sibling closeback tasks.
